title: centaurea urgellensis
intro: Centaurea urgellensis, also known as Catalan cornflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Centaurea urgellensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
